description_long: This is a standard aluminum beverage can with a blue exterior, prominently featuring the Pepsi logo and branding. The can is cylindrical with a slightly tapered top and bottom, and a silver pull-tab opening mechanism on the top. The surface is glossy and smooth, with detailed printed graphics including the red, white, and blue Pepsi globe, large white 'PEPSI' text, and additional product information. Nutritional facts and ingredients are printed on the back in white text on a blue background. The can appears undamaged, with no visible dents or scratches, and is typical of single-serve soft drink containers found in urban environments. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and highly recognizable.
description: A glossy blue aluminum Pepsi can with bold branding, a silver pull-tab top, and detailed printed graphics. The can is smooth, cylindrical, and undamaged.
description_view_0: The can displays the vertical 'PEPSI' logo and the Pepsi globe, with the pull-tab top clearly visible.
description_view_1: The front of the can shows the large 'PEPSI' text and the Pepsi globe, with the brand name centered below.
description_view_2: The can features the lower portion of the Pepsi globe and the volume information '12 FL OZ (355 mL)'.
description_view_3: The back of the can displays nutritional facts, ingredients, and recycling information in white text.
attribute_label_or_branding: The can features the Pepsi logo (red, white, and blue globe), large white 'PEPSI' text, nutritional facts, ingredients, recycling symbols, and website URL, all printed in white on a blue background.
